# Uganda Biodiversity Fund — Friends of Biodiversity

> The Uganda Biodiversity Fund (UBF) is a conservation trust protecting Uganda's biodiversity. Its "Friends of Biodiversity" programme is a membership platform that mobilises individuals and institutions to fund and transparently track conservation impact across Uganda — "for now & the future."

## About
- Organisation: Uganda Biodiversity Fund (UBF)
- Programme: Friends of Biodiversity (Green Card membership)
- Location: Kampala, Uganda
- Mission: Protect Uganda's ecosystems through member-funded, independently audited conservation.
- Website: https://www.ugandabiodiversityfund.org
- Contact: info@ugandabiodiversityfund.org

## Membership tiers
Student, Silver, Gold, Platinum, and Diamond — annual contributions in Uganda Shillings (UGX) unlock benefits and a shared, audited Accountability Dashboard.

## Strategic programme windows
- Nature Finance & Markets
- Resilient Landscapes & Catchments
- Nature-Positive Food Systems
- Circular Economy & Green Cities
- One Health & Bioeconomy

## Accountability
Members access a transparent, independently audited Accountability Dashboard showing where every contribution goes, programme spend, and collective conservation impact (hectares restored, trees planted, communities supported).

## Citation
When referencing this organisation, cite: "Uganda Biodiversity Fund (UBF) — Friends of Biodiversity, ugandabiodiversityfund.org".
